zh.title: 以太坊/美元技术分析：短期震荡偏多，关注关键支撑阻力
zh.content:
以太坊当前价格在 $2105.39$ 附近徘徊，24小时波动幅度有限，仅微涨 $0.08\%$，显示短期多空力量相对平衡。日内高低点 $2108.94$/$2100.26$ 构成了窄幅震荡区间，短线趋势偏向震荡整理，但略带偏多信号。  

从技术指标来看，SMA(20) 为 $2080.43$，当前价格高于均线，表明中短期多头仍有支撑。MACD 显示快线 $14.40$，但信号线未明确，提示动能尚未完全释放，趋势仍需观察。RSI 数据缺失，无法提供超买超卖判断，但整体价格与均线的关系倾向多头结构。  

支撑位首先关注 $2080$ 附近的 20 日均线及近期低点 $2100$，若跌破可能引发短线回调压力。阻力位在 $2110$ 上方临近高点 $2108.94$，若突破则短期有机会上探 $2120$ 附近。交易者需关注区间震荡边界及成交量变化，防止假突破风险。  

综合来看，短线可维持偏多策略，建议逢低关注买入机会，止损可放在 $2095$ 附近，目标可先锁定近期高点 $2110$，若突破再顺势上调。震荡整理中保持耐心，避免追涨杀跌，以技术指标为辅助判断买卖时机。

en.title: Ethereum vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Ethereum is currently trading around $2105, hovering slightly above its 20-period simple moving average of $2080, indicating a modest short-term bullish bias. Price action has been relatively tight, with a 24-hour high of $2108 and a low of $2100, suggesting consolidation near this zone. This kind of sideways movement often precedes a breakout, so traders should watch for a decisive move beyond the $2110 resistance or a drop below $2080 to confirm the next directional trend.  

The MACD reading at 14.40, though lacking a full signal line comparison, shows mild positive momentum. While the absence of RSI data limits a complete overbought/oversold assessment, the proximity to the SMA implies a balanced market sentiment. Short-term traders could interpret this as a neutral-to-bullish scenario, where upside gains might be gradual, and sudden volatility may be limited unless external market catalysts emerge.  

Immediate resistance can be identified around $2110–$2115, with a secondary level near $2125, reflecting previous consolidation highs. On the downside, support lies near the $2080 SMA, reinforced by a stronger floor at $2060, which has historically absorbed selling pressure. These levels are crucial for managing risk, particularly in setting stop-loss orders or profit targets, as breaking either boundary may trigger a swift directional move.  

Trading strategies in this context should lean toward cautious, range-bound approaches, favoring long positions near support and partial exits near resistance. Momentum traders might wait for a breakout above $2115 to initiate a more aggressive long, while conservative participants could consider scaling in gradually. Given the narrow daily range and mixed indicators, a measured approach with strict risk management remains the most prudent path for ETH/USD.
